hero.title: DuangQin Dream Garden
hero.lead: A softer, more curated fan space for slow-burn romance, comfort scenes, playlist feelings, and all the little DuangQin moments that stay with you.

episode_briefs.summary: A first-sight crush turns into a full emotional mission as Duang decides Qin is worth chasing, even before he knows how to do it well.
episode_briefs.tone: high-energy pursuit, instant fixation, campus spark

episode_briefs.summary: The second step is less about grand flirting and more about learning that sincerity lands harder than performance.
episode_briefs.tone: awkward charm, mixed signals, trying too hard

episode_briefs.summary: An assigned partnership shifts the dynamic from one-sided pursuit into shared space, where chemistry has more room to breathe.
episode_briefs.tone: forced proximity, teamwork tension, growing softness

episode_briefs.summary: The relationship starts feeling less chaotic and more intimate, with quiet care doing more work than big declarations.
episode_briefs.tone: domestic warmth, emotional settling, soft glances

episode_briefs.summary: The balance starts changing, and the connection feels more mutual, more careful, and harder to ignore.
episode_briefs.tone: shared longing, guarded honesty, rising stakes

episode_briefs.summary: The slow burn matures into something steadier, where trust, timing, and emotional restraint matter more than spectacle.

upcoming_preview.headline: Upcoming Episode
upcoming_preview.title: Official teaser not released yet
upcoming_preview.summary: The camera will switch to the newest official preview automatically once Domundi releases it.
